title: Polymer Patch For Servux
description: A Servux server-side patch that fixes Polymer item data not converting on clients, with optional Filament support.
body:
# Polymer Patch For Servux

This is a patch for [Servux](https://modrinth.com/mod/servux) that works well as a server side that fixes the phenomenon that the information of the mod items using the [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) is not converted and is received to the client.  

Starting with mod version 1.2+1.21.10, [Filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament) mod is also supported, but it does not depend on Filament mod.

Servux and Polymer are required, but not included in this mod.  

This mod was tested only in versions 1.21.10 and 1.21.11.  

You can read more about [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) and [Servux](https://modrinth.com/mod/servux) on it's Modrinth page!
